name: Hershey Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
Melt the Hershey's milk chocolate and half of the Hershey's syrup over hot water.
Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Stir in the melted chocolate mixture and the remaining syrup. Combine the flour, buttermilk mixed with baking soda, vanilla, and chopped nuts. Mix until just combined.
Pour the batter into a greased and papered tube pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) for 1 1/2 hours. Serve to 10 people.
